description: This file defines a React functional component named 'App' that implements a simple counter UI with increment, decrement, and reset functionalities. It includes state management using useState, memoized formatting with useMemo, and renders a styled counter interface with accessibility features.

methods.name: App()
methods.description: Main functional component that renders the counter UI with internal state and control methods.

methods.name: increment
methods.description: Increases the counter value by one.

methods.name: decrement
methods.description: Decreases the counter value by one.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Resets the counter value to zero.
